author: Sofia K.
text: I remember the first time I met Mickey the Debug Dog. Mickey looked so fierce as they stared at the code with me. I slowly explained everything and they listened to my every word. The pauses were uncomfortable, but then I saw it. Mickey saved me hours of anguish.

author: Moshe J.
text: Mickey has been an amazing help to me, someone who listens to every problem and is never judgmental.

author: Noam H.
text: Mickey is my debugging angel. When I was alone and stuck, they always came and helped me recover from stress and pain.
